content: Both Self-Refine for LLMs and the Reflexion autonomous agent can be combined to form a hierarchical self-improvement stack where lightweight task-specific Self-Refine handles shallow iterative refinement of immediate outputs, and Reflexion’s dynamic long-term memory accumulates generalized feedback across multiple refinement cycles to improve future task performance from the start. This stacked design eliminates the tradeoff between fast zero-training refinement and generalizable self-improvement that plagues both methods when used in isolation.
